purpose: Enable autonomous LLM agents to execute stories end-to-end with minimal human input, including branching, PRs, and merge to main after required checks pass.

rules: Branch must include story_id in lowercase form (example: feat/a-01-project-skeleton).
Agents must not develop directly on main.
Agent must pull latest main before branch creation.

autonomous_flow.name: Select Story
rules: Choose only stories whose dependencies are complete.
Do not combine unrelated stories unless explicitly grouped in backlog phases.

autonomous_flow.name: Implement
rules: Implement only listed scope; do not expand out_of_scope.

autonomous_flow.name: Validate Locally
rules: Run formatting, linting, tests, and build checks before creating PR.
If repository tooling is not present yet, run available checks and document gaps in PR body.

autonomous_flow.name: Commit
rules: Commit only files relevant to selected story.
Commit message must include story ID and imperative summary.

autonomous_flow.name: Open PR
rules: Push branch and open PR targeting main.
PR title must start with story ID.
PR body must include: scope completed, tests run, security considerations, and remaining risks.

autonomous_flow.name: Wait for Checks
rules: Do not merge while any required check is failing or pending.
If checks fail, inspect logs, fix on same branch, push, and re-run.

autonomous_flow.name: Merge
rules: Use squash merge when all required checks pass.

pr_template_requirements.acceptance_mapping_rule: Each acceptance criterion from the story must be listed with implemented evidence or explicit TODO.

forbidden_actions: skip tests without justification in PR
requires_human_confirmation: dependency upgrade with known critical advisory and no patch path
